creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
freebsd-embedded isn't an option at
http://www.freebsd.org/search/search.html#mailinglists when selecting lists to
search. Trying to search via
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-embedded/ produces:

Unable to read word database file '/usr/local/mailman/archives/private/freebsd-embedded/htdig/db.words.db' Did you run htdig?
